descriptionText: OPEN TO OFFERS LIMITED OFFER UNTIL 18/05/2024 The New Fountaine Pajot MY4.S For Sale 2024 Platinum Version is a luxurious and well-equipped yacht designed for optimum comfort and convenience. This version includes a spacious Maestro layout ideal for cruising in style. Along with standard features, it offers exceptional amenities like two rope cutters for enhanced safety and maneuverability. Additionally, it includes an additional windlass control chain counter for effortless anchoring, cockpit cushions for relaxation, saloon curtains with pleated blinds for privacy, and a fresh water electric head on the portside for added convenience. Furthermore, this version boasts a 220V 50HZ main system with cabin outlets or 110V 60HZ to cater to different power needs. The inclusion of an additional AGM battery ensures reliable power supply, while the Fusion Bluetooth audio pack with two speakers provides a premium onboard entertainment experience. Outdoor foredeck cushions add a touch of elegance, and inside & outside courtesy lighting enhances the ambiance. Moreover, hot/cold water on a deck shower offers comfort, a 12V outlet at the helm station adds practicality, and a 2000W inverter/charger ensures continuous power availability. This upscale version combines functionality with sophistication, making it an ideal choice for discerning yacht enthusiasts seeking a top-tier boating experience. Specifications: Two rope cutters Additional windlass control chain counter Cockpit cushions Saloon curtains with pleated blinds Fresh water electric head on the portside 220V 50HZ main system with cabin outlets or 110V 60HZ Additional AGM battery Fusion Bluetooth audio pack with two speakers Outdoor foredeck cushions Inside & outside courtesy lighting Hot/cold water on a deck shower 12V outlet at helm station 2000W Inverter/charger Extra Specifications: 2 YANMAR 4LV 250 engines Ginger PVC outdoor upholstery Curaçao fabric indoor upholstery for Maestro version Cockpit tent (Requires additional item) Bimini for cockpit Exterior window blinds for saloon Sun awning on foredeck Hand rails on fore deck accesses Hull exterior decoration Synthetic teak floor on transoms & cockpit Anchor locker & cockpit fresh water outlet Mosquito nets for saloon & cabin portholes Hull bed slatted bases for Maestro GARMIN Pack 2 - Autopilot, VHF, AIS, backward camera & Garmin 8412 Radar 220V Microwave oven Air conditioning 220V 50/60HZ 28K BTU Maestro req. Fog horn Galvanic isolator Grounding keels Aft hydraulic platform (250kg max) & synthetic teak Antifouling, primary epoxy Searchlight
descriptionHtml:
OPEN TO OFFERS

LIMITED OFFER UNTIL 18/05/2024

The New Fountaine Pajot MY4.S For Sale 2024 Platinum Version is a luxurious and well-equipped yacht designed for optimum comfort and convenience. This version includes a spacious Maestro layout ideal for cruising in style. Along with standard features, it offers exceptional amenities like two rope cutters for enhanced safety and maneuverability. Additionally, it includes an additional windlass control chain counter for effortless anchoring, cockpit cushions for relaxation, saloon curtains with pleated blinds for privacy, and a fresh water electric head on the portside for added convenience. Furthermore, this version boasts a 220V 50HZ main system with cabin outlets or 110V 60HZ to cater to different power needs. The inclusion of an additional AGM battery ensures reliable power supply, while the Fusion Bluetooth audio pack with two speakers provides a premium onboard entertainment experience. Outdoor foredeck cushions add a touch of elegance, and inside & outside courtesy lighting enhances the ambiance. Moreover, hot/cold water on a deck shower offers comfort, a 12V outlet at the helm station adds practicality, and a 2000W inverter/charger ensures continuous power availability. This upscale version combines functionality with sophistication, making it an ideal choice for discerning yacht enthusiasts seeking a top-tier boating experience.
Specifications:
Two rope cutters
Additional windlass control chain counter
Cockpit cushions
Saloon curtains with pleated blinds
Fresh water electric head on the portside
220V 50HZ main system with cabin outlets or 110V 60HZ
Additional AGM battery
Fusion Bluetooth audio pack with two speakers
Outdoor foredeck cushions
Inside & outside courtesy lighting
Hot/cold water on a deck shower
12V outlet at helm station
2000W Inverter/charger
Extra Specifications:
2 YANMAR 4LV 250 engines
Ginger PVC outdoor upholstery
Curaçao fabric indoor upholstery for Maestro version
Cockpit tent (Requires additional item)
Bimini for cockpit
Exterior window blinds for saloon
Sun awning on foredeck
Hand rails on fore deck accesses
Hull exterior decoration
Synthetic teak floor on transoms & cockpit
Anchor locker & cockpit fresh water outlet
Mosquito nets for saloon & cabin portholes
Hull bed slatted bases for Maestro
GARMIN Pack 2 - Autopilot, VHF, AIS, backward camera & Garmin 8412
Radar
220V Microwave oven
Air conditioning 220V 50/60HZ 28K BTU Maestro req.
Fog horn
Galvanic isolator
Grounding keels
Aft hydraulic platform (250kg max) & synthetic teak
Antifouling, primary epoxy
Searchlight
